scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix tui-web"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix packages/shared && npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix tui-web && npm run validate:web-dist
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix packages/shared && npm run typecheck --prefix server && npm run typecheck --prefix tui-web
scripts.ci: npm run build --prefix packages/shared && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
